title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The open-source vulnerability scanner itself does not pose a direct threat, but its widespread adoption could lead to malicious actors analyzing its functionality to identify weaknesses or exploit patterns in its scanning logic. Additionally, improper use or over-reliance on the tool without thorough validation could result in missed vulnerabilities or false positives.
recommended_actions: Conduct a thorough review of the tool's source code and functionality before integrating it into your security processes.
Use the tool as a supplementary measure alongside existing vulnerability management practices, not as a sole solution.
Monitor the tool's updates and community discussions for any reported issues or potential misuse.

title: A flaw was found in Keycloak. The cross-session verification proof is keyed only by (local userId...
description:
A flaw was found in Keycloak. The cross-session verification proof is keyed only by (local userId,
idpAlias) and is not bound to the upstream identity that was actually verified, so a second upstream account on the same IdP can consume it and get linked to the victim's local account.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-9087.

title: Prototype pollution in csv parsing logic during import can lead to untrusted file paths (but not...
description: Prototype pollution in csv parsing logic during import can lead to untrusted file paths (but not arguments) entering shell.openExternal after specific user behavior leading to "1-click" command execution.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-9101.

title: The MongoDB C Driver's legacy GridFS API accepts malformed file metadata from the database...
description: The MongoDB C Driver's legacy GridFS API accepts malformed file metadata from the database without adequate validation. Crafted documents in a GridFS collection may cause any application that reads those files via the legacy API to either crash (via a division-by-zero) or silently leak process memory contents (via an out-of-bounds read).

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the MongoDB C Driver's legacy GridFS API could allow attackers to crash applications using the API or exploit out-of-bounds reads to leak sensitive memory contents, potentially leading to data breaches or application downtime.
recommended_actions: Upgrade to the latest version of the MongoDB C Driver that addresses CVE-2026-9100 and deprecates the use of the legacy GridFS API.
Conduct a thorough code review to identify and replace any usage of the legacy GridFS API with more secure alternatives.
Implement additional input validation and error handling mechanisms in applications interacting with GridFS collections to mitigate potential exploitation.

title: The Cost of Goods by PixelYourSite plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site...
description: The Cost of Goods by PixelYourSite plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'csvdata[0][cost_of_goods_value]' parameter in versions up to, and including, 1.2.12 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthenticated attackers to inject malicious scripts into WordPress pages, potentially leading to data theft, session hijacking, or site defacement. This could compromise user trust and expose sensitive information.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the Cost of Goods by PixelYourSite plugin to the latest patched version or disable it until a patch is available.
Implement a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to block malicious payloads targeting this vulnerability.
Perform a thorough review of your website for any signs of compromise, including injected scripts or unauthorized changes.

title: In Splunk Enterprise versions below 10.2.2, 10.0.5, 9.4.11, and 9.3.12, and Splunk Cloud Platform...
description:
In Splunk Enterprise versions below 10.2.2, 10.0.5, 9.4.11, and 9.3.12, and Splunk Cloud Platform versions below 10.4.2603.1, 10.3.2512.9, 10.2.2510.11, 10.1.2507.21, 10.0.2503.13, and 9.3.2411.129, a low-privileged user that does not hold the ‘admin’ or ‘power’ Splunk roles could cause a Denial of Service by exploiting the `coldToFrozen.sh` script in the `splunk_archiver` app to rename critical Splunk directories, making the instance non-functional.

The Denial of Service is possible beca

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-20240.

title: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in @cyntler/react-doc-viewer v1.17.1 allows remote...
description: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in @cyntler/react-doc-viewer v1.17.1 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary JavaScript via a crafted .txt file. The TXTRenderer component fails to sanitize file content and explicitly casts raw data as a ReactNode

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The XSS vulnerability in @cyntler/react-doc-viewer v1.17.1 allows attackers to execute arbitrary JavaScript, potentially leading to data theft, session hijacking, or unauthorized actions within the application. This could compromise user data and application integrity.
recommended_actions: Upgrade to a patched version of @cyntler/react-doc-viewer as soon as it becomes available.
Implement input sanitization and validation for all user-supplied content, especially in the TXTRenderer component.
Conduct a security audit to identify and mitigate similar vulnerabilities in other components of the application.

title: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in InfoScale v.9.1.3 Operations Manager (VIOM)...
description: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in InfoScale v.9.1.3 Operations Manager (VIOM) allows an attacker to force the user with an active session into clicking a malicious HTML link, which triggers unintended modifications on VIOM web application without the user's knowledge.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-44925.

title: In Splunk AI Toolkit versions below 5.7.3, a low-privileged user that does not hold the 'admin'...
description:
In Splunk AI Toolkit versions below 5.7.3, a low-privileged user that does not hold the 'admin' or 'power' roles could access confidential data that was restricted through `srchFilter` configurations on custom roles.

The app contains an `authorize.conf` configuration file with a `srchFilter` entry that modifies the built-in ‘user’ role. Because the Splunk platform combines inherited search filters with the `OR` SPL operator, the injected filter overrides more restrictive filters on child

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-20238.

title: In Splunk Enterprise versions below 10.2.2 and 10.0.5, and Splunk Cloud Platform versions below...
description: In Splunk Enterprise versions below 10.2.2 and 10.0.5, and Splunk Cloud Platform versions below 10.3.2512.8, 10.2.2510.11, 10.1.2507.21, and 10.0.2503.13, a user with a role that has access to the `_internal` index could view session cookies and response bodies that contain sensitive data.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows users with access to the `_internal` index to view sensitive session cookies and response bodies, potentially leading to session hijacking, unauthorized access, and data breaches.
recommended_actions: Upgrade Splunk Enterprise to version 10.2.2 or 10.0.5, and Splunk Cloud Platform to the latest patched versions (10.3.2512.8, 10.2.2510.11, 10.1.2507.21, or 10.0.2503.13).
Restrict access to the `_internal` index to only trusted and essential personnel with a clear need for access.
Monitor logs for unusual activity or unauthorized access to the `_internal` index and session data.

title: SQL injection in InfoScale VIOM before v9.1.3 allows remote attackers to escalate privileges.
description: SQL injection in InfoScale VIOM before v9.1.3 allows remote attackers to escalate privileges.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The SQL injection vulnerability in InfoScale VIOM before v9.1.3 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands, potentially leading to privilege escalation, unauthorized access, data exfiltration, or system compromise.
recommended_actions: Immediately update InfoScale VIOM to version 9.1.3 or later to mitigate the vulnerability.
Conduct a thorough review of access logs to identify any signs of exploitation or unauthorized access.
Implement input validation and parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection vulnerabilities in custom applications.

Cisco has addressed this vulnerability in the Cisco ThousandEyes Enterprise Agent, and no customer action is needed.

This vulnerability was due to insufficient input validation of command arguments that are supplied by the user. Prior to this vulnerability bein

description:
A vulnerability in the access validation of internal REST APIs of Cisco Secure Workload could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to access site resources with the privileges of the Site Admin role.

This vulnerability is due to insufficient validation and authentication when accessing REST API endpoints. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability if they are able to send a crafted API request to an affected endpoint. A successful exploit could allow the attacker to read sensit

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-20223.

title: Incorrect default permissions vulnerability in Progress Software MOVEit Automation allows...
description:
Incorrect default permissions vulnerability in Progress Software MOVEit Automation allows Retrieve Embedded Sensitive Data.

This issue affects MOVEit Automation: before 2025.0.11, from 2025.1.0 before 2025.1.7.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Progress Software MOVEit Automation could allow unauthorized access to sensitive embedded data due to incorrect default permissions. This could lead to data breaches, regulatory non-compliance, and reputational damage.
recommended_actions: Immediately update MOVEit Automation to version 2025.0.11 or 2025.1.7, or later, to mitigate the vulnerability.
Review and audit default permissions in your MOVEit Automation environment to ensure they align with the principle of least privilege.
Monitor system logs for any unauthorized access attempts and implement additional access controls if necessary.

title: Allocation of resources without limits or throttling vulnerability in Progress Software MOVEit...
description:
Allocation of resources without limits or throttling vulnerability in Progress Software MOVEit Automation allows Excessive Allocation.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8488.

title: Dell PowerFlex Manager, version(s) <=4.6.2, contain(s) an Exposure of Information Through...
description: Dell PowerFlex Manager, version(s) <=4.6.2, contain(s) an Exposure of Information Through Directory Listing vulnerability. An unauthenticated attacker with remote access could potentially exploit this vulnerability, leading to Information exposure.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Dell PowerFlex Manager (versions <=4.6.2) allows unauthenticated remote attackers to exploit directory listing, potentially exposing sensitive information such as configuration files, credentials, or other critical data. This could lead to further exploitation, unauthorized access, or data breaches.
recommended_actions: Immediately upgrade Dell PowerFlex Manager to the latest available version that addresses CVE-2025-32750.
Restrict access to the affected system by implementing network-level controls, such as firewalls or VPNs, to limit exposure to trusted IPs only.
Perform a security audit to identify any sensitive information that may have already been exposed and monitor for unauthorized access or anomalies.

title: A vulnerability in the Border Gateway Protocol (BGP) enforce-first-as feature of Cisco...
description:
A vulnerability in the Border Gateway Protocol (BGP) enforce-first-as feature of Cisco Nexus 3000 Series Switches and Cisco Nexus 9000 Series Switches in standalone NX-OS mode could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to trigger BGP peer flaps, resulting in a denial of service (DoS) condition.

This vulnerability is due to incorrect parsing of a transitive BGP attribute. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability by sending a crafted BGP update through an established BGP peer s

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-20171.

title: CVE-2025-9987 - The Broadstreet plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Sensitive Information Exposure in all versions
description: The Broadstreet plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Sensitive Information Exposure in all versions up to, and including, 1.53.1 via the get_sponsored_meta() AJAX action. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with subscriber-level access and above, to extract data from password protected and private business details.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the Broadstreet plugin for WordPress allows authenticated attackers with subscriber-level access or higher to extract sensitive business details, including data from password-protected and private areas. This could lead to unauthorized disclosure of sensitive business information, reputational damage, and potential compliance violations.
recommended_actions: Immediately update or disable the Broadstreet plugin if it is not critical to operations, and monitor for a patched version from the vendor.
Restrict user roles and permissions to the minimum necessary, ensuring that only trusted users have subscriber-level access or higher.
Conduct a review of access logs to identify any unauthorized attempts to exploit the vulnerability and assess potential data exposure.

title: CVE-2025-14755 - The Cost Calculator Builder plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Unauthenticated Price Manipulation
description: The Cost Calculator Builder plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Unauthenticated Price Manipulation and Insecure Direct Object Reference (IDOR) in all versions up to, and including, 4.0.1 only when used in combination with Cost Calculator Builder PRO. This is due to the ccb_woocommerce_payment AJAX action being registered via wp_ajax_nopriv, making it accessible to unauthenticated users, and the renderWooCommercePayment() function passing user-controlled data directly to CCBWooCheckout::init() without authorization checks. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to add WooCommerce products to their cart with attacker-controlled prices.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2025-14755.

title: CVE-2026-8336 - After invoking $_internalJsEmit, which is not intended to be directly accessible, or mapreduce comma
description:
After invoking $_internalJsEmit, which is not intended to be directly accessible, or mapreduce command’s map function in a certain way, an authenticated user can subsequently crash mongod when the server-side JavaScript engine (through $where, $function, mapreduce reduce stage, etc.) is used also in a specific way, resulting in a post-authentication denial-of-service.

This issue impacts MongoDB Server v8.2 versions prior to 8.2.9 and v8.3 versions prior to 8.3.2.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: This vulnerability allows an authenticated user to crash the MongoDB server via a denial-of-service (DoS) attack by exploiting the server-side JavaScript engine. This can disrupt database operations, leading to downtime and potential loss of service availability.
recommended_actions: Immediately upgrade MongoDB Server to version 8.2.9 or 8.3.2, or later, to patch the vulnerability.
Restrict access to authenticated users and ensure that only trusted users have access to the database.
Monitor database logs for unusual activity, particularly around the use of server-side JavaScript functions, and implement rate-limiting or additional monitoring for authenticated users.

title: CVE-2026-8202 - Using a densely populated chars mask and a large input string in the MongoDB aggregation operators $
description:
Using a densely populated chars mask and a large input string in the MongoDB aggregation operators $trim, $ltrim, and $rtrim, an authenticated user with aggregation permissions can pin CPU utilization at 100% for an extended period of time.

This issue impacts MongoDB Server v7.0 versions prior to 7.0.34, v8.0 versions prior to 8.0.23, v8.2 versions prior to 8.2.9 and v8.3 versions prior to 8.3.2.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8202.

title: CVE-2026-8201 - A use-after-free vulnerability exists in MongoDB's Field-Level Encryption (FLE) query analysis compo
description:
A use-after-free vulnerability exists in MongoDB's Field-Level Encryption (FLE) query analysis component, affecting client-side uses of mongocryptd and crypt_shared. Triggering this vulnerability requires control over the structure of a client's FLE-related query.

This issue impacts MongoDB Server’s mongocryptd component v7.0 versions prior to 7.0.34, v8.0 versions prior to 8.0.23, v8.2 versions prior to 8.2.9 and v8.3 versions prior to 8.3.2.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8201.

title: CVE-2026-8200 - When schema validation is enabled on a collection and an update or insert would violate the collecti
description:
When schema validation is enabled on a collection and an update or insert would violate the collection's schema, the local server log message generated may not have all user data redacted. 


This issue impacts MongoDB Server v7.0 versions prior to 7.0.34, v8.0 versions prior to 8.0.23, v8.2 versions prior to 8.2.9 and v8.3 versions prior to 8.3.2.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8200.

title: CVE-2026-8199 - An authenticated user can cause excess memory usage via bitwise match expression AST processing of $
description:
An authenticated user can cause excess memory usage via bitwise match expression AST processing of $bitsAllSet, $bitsAnySet, $bitsAllClear, and $bitsAnyClear. This contributes to memory pressure and may lead to availability loss by OOM.

This issue impacts MongoDB Server v7.0 versions prior to 7.0.34, v8.0 versions prior to 8.0.23, v8.2 versions prior to 8.2.9 and v8.3 versions prior to 8.3.2.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8199.

title: CVE-2026-8053 - An issue in MongoDB Server's time-series collection implementation allows an authenticated user with
description:
An issue in MongoDB Server's time-series collection implementation allows an authenticated user with database write privileges to trigger an out-of-bounds memory write in the mongod process. The issue results from an inconsistency in the internal field-name-to-index mapping within the time-series bucket catalog. Under certain conditions this can result in arbitrary code execution.

This issue impacts MongoDB Server v5.0 versions prior to 5.0.33, v6.0 versions prior to 6.0.28, v7.0 versions prior to 7.0.34, v8.0 versions prior to 8.0.23, v8.2 versions prior to 8.2.9 and v8.3 versions prior to 8.3.2.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8053.

title: CVE-2025-61972 - Missing lock bit protection for NBIO registers could allow a local admin-privileged attacker to gain
description: Missing lock bit protection for NBIO registers could allow a local admin-privileged attacker to gain arbitrary System Management Network (SMN) access, potentially resulting in arbitrary code execution in AMD Secure Processor (ASP) and loss of the SEV-SNP guest's confidentiality and integrity.
